title: S33R Fae Allay
description: Gives allays a random appearance themed around fairies of various colors and themes.
body:
This pack is made for version 1.19+ and requires Optifine or an Optifine like mod.

This pack uses custom entity models and random entity textures to give the Allay a new, fairy-like model as well as adding a randomized texture. It adds a fairy design themed around every Minecraft color, five elements, the Pixie Hollow fairy designs, and many more!

You can spawn in an Allay and have it's texture randomized, or rename it one of the below names to get a specified texture.

Hope this adds a bit of fantasy magic to your worlds o/

~ Seer

## All Names
Name an item tag in an anvil the below names, WITHOUT the "quotation marks":
- "Red"
- "Orange"
- "Yellow"
- "Lime"
- "Green"
- "Cyan"
- "Light Blue"
- "Blue"
- "Purple"
- "Magenta"
- "Pink"
- "Brown"
- "Black"
- "Gray"
- "Light Gray"
- "White"
- "Chef"
- "Amethyst"
- "Goth"
- "Rainbow"
- "Skulk"
- "Fire"
- "Water"
- "Earth"
- "Air"
- "Light"
- "Tinker"
- "Flora"

- "????"
